message:
Fix clippy lints and doc comment formatting in demo_showcase

Clippy lint suppressions:
- draw_drawing_section: Add too_many_lines allow
- draw_colors_section: Add cast_possible_wrap and too_many_lines allows
- draw_animations_section: Add type_complexity allow

Code quality:
- Replace 'intensity as f32' with 'f32::from(intensity)' for
  explicit type conversion (clippy::cast_lossless)

Documentation:
- Use backticks around type names in doc comments (EditBuffer,
  BoxStyle) for rustdoc formatting consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
